_comment: Non-secret config. operator_project is the central GCP project holding the workshop secrets in Secret Manager; override with WORKSHOP_OPERATOR_PROJECT. 'secrets' maps an environment variable name to the Secret Manager secret that holds its value. Secret VALUES never live here — only in Secret Manager. operator_service_account (optional) is a SA to impersonate for Terraform + gcloud so runs avoid user reauth; override with WORKSHOP_IMPERSONATE_SA. Leave empty to use your own ADC.
